source_pr.title: domain/affinity: update pd client for api
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/64938
Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test


### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Performance**
  * Faster, more scalable retrieval of affinity groups for large ID requests.
* **Bug Fixes**
  * Reduced failures by avoiding oversized queries and adding robust fallbacks when the backend rejects ID-based fetches.
  * More reliable affinity group creation with idempotent checks and safe fallback creation paths.
* **New Features**
  * Support for forceful batch deletion of affinity groups.
* **Tests**
  * Added comprehensive tests for creation, retrieval, fallbacks, and boundary cases.
* **Chores**
  * Bumped an internal backend dependency to a newer version.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
